scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral typecheck && bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral-dev-app typecheck
scripts.dev: bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral build && bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral-dev-app dev
scripts.dev:unhappy: bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral build && bun run --filter @opsydyn/elysia-spectral-dev-app dev:unhappy
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test
